item.title: Extract shared option parser to reduce duplication across cmd_* functions
item.intent: Replace the duplicated while/case/shift option parsing in every cmd_* function with a shared parse_opts() helper or standardized pattern, eliminating ~100 lines of boilerplate
steps: Catalog all cmd_* functions and their option parsing patterns
Design a shared parse_opts() helper or declare-based pattern
Refactor cmd_run, cmd_backlog_add, cmd_backlog_edit, cmd_backlog_list and others to use it
Ensure unknown option rejection still works per-command
acceptanceCriteria: Option parsing boilerplate is reduced by at least 50%
All commands still correctly parse their flags and reject unknown options
